title: For a Caregiver Who Is Burning Out
body: Lord, I have been doing this for a long time. The days blur. The person I love is so different from the person I married / parented / befriended. I am tired. I am not complaining. I am just tired. Rest me. Send me one small kindness today. Remind me why I started. And let me feel, just for a moment, that I am not doing this alone. Amen.
